name: flow
description: Flow agentic workflow plugin with setup and execution skills.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and run the FLOW workflow
interface.longDescription: Provides flow-setup to install/init Flow in a repo and flow-run to execute BRANCH -> SELECT -> PLAN -> EXECUTE -> ARCHIVE -> REVIEW -> FOLLOW-UP -> ARCHIVE-REVIEW.
defaultPrompt: Use $flow-setup to install Flow in this repository.
Run the next task end-to-end using $flow-run.
